svg.title: UML class diagram — bomberman-server
svg.desc: Server classes laid out in four columns: network layer, session and lobby, match orchestration, and supporting services (auth, ai, chat, moderation, config). MatchManager is the primary entry point.
svg.text: MatchManager is the primary orchestration entry. The Netty pipeline feeds inputs to MatchSession which owns a GameWorld from bomberman-core.

g.text: - x, z, yaw : float ; coins : int
